turns.name: WARREN BURGER
turns.text: We will hear arguments first this morning in Larson against Valente. Mr. Salustro, you may proceed whenever you are ready.

turns.name: SALUSTRO
turns.text: Mr. Chief Justice, and may it please the Court, this case involves the narrow issue of the exemption provision in Minnesota's Charitable Solicitation Act. The provision in question exempts from the financial disclosure requirements otherwise applicable to charitable organizations in the Act those religious organizations and societies which solicit more than half of their contributions from their members and from their affiliates. The appeal presents the question whether the establishment clause prohibits a state from tailoring a regulatory program to allow coverage of some religious Plaintiffs in this case are the Holy Spirit Association for the Unification of World Christianity, Incorporated, and four of its members.
